questions.question: What is the minimum age required to vote in Indian general elections?
questions.hint: This was changed by the 61st Constitutional Amendment in 1988.

questions.question: Which body is responsible for conducting free and fair elections in India?
questions.hint: It is an independent constitutional authority established in 1950.

questions.question: The Right to Education is guaranteed under which Article of the Indian Constitution?
questions.hint: This article was added by the 86th Constitutional Amendment in 2002.

questions.question: Which of the following is a Fundamental Duty of Indian citizens as listed in Article 51A?
options: To protect and improve the natural environment
questions.hint: Fundamental Duties were added by the 42nd Amendment in 1976.

questions.question: In India's federal structure, which list in the Constitution covers subjects on which ONLY the Central Government can make laws?
questions.hint: This list contains 97 subjects including defence, foreign affairs, and atomic energy.

questions.question: Which Amendment of the Indian Constitution gave Constitutional status to Panchayati Raj institutions?
questions.hint: This amendment was passed in 1992 and added Part IX to the Constitution.

questions.question: The concept of 'Judicial Review' in India means the power of courts to:
options: Examine and strike down laws that violate the Constitution
Conduct annual review of all pending cases
questions.hint: This power is primarily exercised by the Supreme Court and High Courts.

questions.question: Which Writ is issued by a court to a public official directing them to perform their official duty?
questions.hint: The name of this Writ means 'We Command' in Latin.

questions.question: The Directive Principles of State Policy (DPSP) in India are inspired by the Constitution of which country?
questions.hint: This European island nation's constitution heavily influenced Part IV of the Indian Constitution.

questions.question: Under which schedule of the Indian Constitution are the anti-defection provisions contained?
questions.hint: This schedule was added by the 52nd Constitutional Amendment Act of 1985.
